Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore

Interface Attribute

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, ILAttribute, LightObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttributeImpl
public interface Attribute extends LightObject, ILAttribute
A representation of the model object 'Attribute'.

The following features are supported:

  • Type
  • Value
  • EOwner
  • Entry
  • Key

See Also:
  • LightcorePackage.getAttribute()

  • Method Details

    • getType

      Object getType()
      Returns the value of the 'Type' attribute. The default value is "".

      If the meaning of the 'Type' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

      Returns:
      the value of the 'Type' attribute.
      See Also:
      • setType(Object)
      • LightcorePackage.getAttribute_Type()

    • setType

      void setType(Object value)
      Sets the value of the 'Type' attribute.
      Parameters:
      value - the new value of the 'Type' attribute.
      See Also:
      • getType()

    • getValue

      Object getValue()
      Returns the value of the 'Value' attribute.

      Returns:
      the value of the 'Value' attribute.
      See Also:

      • LightcorePackage.getAttribute_Value()

      Parameters:

      See Also:
